ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pokemon_species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon species */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Identifier name of the Pokémon species */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Generation in which the Pokémon was introduced */,
  "evolves_from_species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species this Pokémon evolves from */,
  "evolution_chain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evolution chain this Pokémon belongs to */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color of the Pokémon */,
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shape of the Pokémon */,
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the habitat of the Pokémon */,
  "gender_rate" INTEGER /* Rate at which the Pokémon can be male or female */,
  "capture_rate" INTEGER /* Rate at which the Pokémon can be captured */,
  "base_happiness" INTEGER /* Base happiness value of the Pokémon */,
  "is_baby" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the Pokémon is a baby */,
  "hatch_counter" INTEGER /* Number of steps it takes for the Pokémon egg to hatch */,
  "has_gender_differences" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the Pokémon has gender differences */,
  "growth_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the growth rate of the Pokémon */,
  "forms_switchable" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the Pokémon can switch forms */,
  "is_legendary" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the Pokémon is legendary */,
  "is_mythical" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the Pokémon is mythical */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the Pokémon in the species list */,
  "conquest_order" INTEGER /* Order of the Pokémon in the conquest list */,
  "height_m" REAL /* Height of the Pokémon in meters */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight of the Pokémon in kilograms */,
  "base_experience" INTEGER /* Base experience points gained from defeating this Pokémon */,
  "abilities" TEXT /* JSON array of abilities the Pokémon can have */,
  "hidden_ability" TEXT /* JSON array of hidden abilities the Pokémon can have */,
  "egg_groups" TEXT /* JSON array of egg groups the Pokémon belongs to */,
  "introduced_in_game" TEXT /* Name of the game in which the Pokémon was introduced */,
  "pokedex_entry" TEXT /* Description of the Pokémon from the Pokédex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_species_habitat_id FOREIGN KEY ("habitat_id") REFERENCES habitats ("habitat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_species_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_species_evolution_chain_id FOREIGN KEY ("evolution_chain_id") REFERENCES evolution_chains ("evolution_chain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_species_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_species_growth_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("growth_rate_id") REFERENCES growth_rates ("growth_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_species_shape_id FOREIGN KEY ("shape_id") REFERENCES shapes ("shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generations" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the generation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the generation */,
  "main_game_version" TEXT /* Name of the main game version for this generation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the generation was released */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the next generation was released (null for the latest generation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evolution_chains" (
  "evolution_chain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evolution chain */,
  "base_species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base species in the evolution chain */,
  "chain_length" INTEGER /* Length of the evolution chain (number of stages) */,
  "start_species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first species in the evolution chain */,
  "end_species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last species in the evolution chain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evolution_chain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the color */,
  "rgb_value" TEXT /* RGB value of the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shapes" (
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shape */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the shape */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shape */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon representing the shape */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitats" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the habitat */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the habitat */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the habitat */,
  "terrain" TEXT /* Terrain type of the habitat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_rates" (
  "growth_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth rate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the growth rate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the growth rate */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the Pokémon's growth rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evolutions" (
  "evolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evolution */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon species that evolves */,
  "evolves_to_species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon species it evolves into */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of evolution (e.g., level, item, trade) */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level at which the Pokémon evolves */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item required for evolution */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day required for evolution */,
  "known_move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move the Pokémon must know for evolution */,
  "known_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type the Pokémon must know for evolution */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location required for evolution */,
  "trade_species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the Pokémon must trade for evolution */,
  "additional_requirements" TEXT /* JSON array of additional requirements for evolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolutions_trade_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_species_id") REFERENCES pokemon_species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolutions_known_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("known_type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolutions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolutions_evolves_to_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("evolves_to_species_id") REFERENCES pokemon_species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolutions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolutions_known_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("known_move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evolutions_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES pokemon_species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the item */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moves" (
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the move */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the move */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of the move */,
  "power" INTEGER /* Power of the move */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the move */,
  "pp" INTEGER /* PP (Power Points) of the move */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the move */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the move */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "damage_relations" TEXT /* JSON object describing the type's damage relations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is found */,
  "map_url" TEXT /* URL to a map of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forms" (
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each form */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon species */,
  "form_name" TEXT /* Name of the form */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if this is the default form */,
  "is_mega" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if this is a Mega form */,
  "is_giga" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if this is a Giga form */,
  "form_description" TEXT /* Description of the form */,
  "form_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forms_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES pokemon_species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, content creator, data analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Pokémon species being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the species */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the species was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES pokemon_species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
